# Franco Riottini Depetris

> Expanded LLM context file for the public website of Franco Riottini Depetris (Economics PhD student at the University of Michigan). This file is intended for inference-time assistance and includes only publicly shareable content.

Scope and privacy policy for this file:
- Include only public website content and public documents.
- Exclude confidential drafts, private files, and unpublished materials.
- Prefer canonical website URLs for user-facing answers.

Last updated: 2026-02-23

## Canonical URLs

- [Home / Bio](https://francoriottini.github.io/)
- [CV](https://francoriottini.github.io/cv/)
- [Publications](https://francoriottini.github.io/publications/)
- [Teaching](https://francoriottini.github.io/teaching/)
- [PhD Notes](https://francoriottini.github.io/phd-notes/)
- [Blog](https://francoriottini.github.io/blog/)

## Profile Summary

Franco Riottini Depetris is a PhD student in Economics at the University of Michigan (started August 2025). He previously completed an MA in Economics at Universidad de San Andres (UdeSA), where he also worked as a pre-doctoral assistant. His main research interests include international economics, firm dynamics and productivity, health, and education, with applied machine learning and LLM methods.

Previously, he worked as a consultant for the Inter-American Development Bank and the World Bank, and as an economic analyst at the Center for Studies of the Santa Fe Chamber of Commerce.

## Contact and Profiles

- Email: friottinidepetris@udesa.edu.ar
- Email: friodep@umich.edu
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=es&user=kApGnjIAAAAJ
- GitHub: https://github.com/francoriottini
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/franco-riottini-610a0b189/
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/francoriottini

## Public Research Outputs

- [Do Ambassadors Matter? The effect of ambassadors on trade promotion](https://francoriottini.github.io/publication/2024-02-01-Do-Ambassadors-Matter)
  This master thesis studies the causal impact of ambassadors on trade promotion, using the 2012 Paraguayan political crisis as a natural experiment. The analysis reports reductions in suppliers and imported products after ambassador withdrawal.
- [Automatic Product Classification in International Trade: Machine Learning and Large Language Models](https://francoriottini.github.io/publication/2024-08-30-Automatic-Product-Classification-in-International-Trade)
  This paper compares ML and LLM approaches for product classification from text descriptions in trade datasets. It highlights stronger cross-dataset generalization for leading LLMs.
- [The Value of Organic Certifications](https://francoriottini.github.io/publication/2024-04-28-WIP)
  Work in progress on the export effects of USDA organic certifications for firms in Latin America, including within-firm and across-firm spillovers.

## Public Blog Content

- [An Incomplete Thought About Justice](https://francoriottini.github.io/posts/2025/03/Thought-About-Justice/)
  Spanish-language reflection on justice, Rawls, and fairness in social and interpersonal contexts.
- [Nativos de IA](https://francoriottini.github.io/posts/2025/06/AI-native/)
  Spanish-language essay on AI-native generations, expected labor market skills, and adaptation strategies for digital natives.

## Teaching Summary

Teaching roles are listed at [Teaching](https://francoriottini.github.io/teaching/), including:
- Lecturer: Economics I (UdeSA).
- Teaching Assistant roles in International Economics, International Quantitative Macroeconomics, Economics I, Mathematics I, History of Economic Thought, Introduction to Economics, Introduction to Social Sciences, and Macroeconomics.

## PhD Notes

The [PhD Notes](https://francoriottini.github.io/phd-notes/) page provides semester/course-organized notes with downloadable PDF (and some TEX) files from `files/phd-notes/`.
